summary: The video captures a street scene with multiple pedestrians walking alongside vehicles. A man carrying a bag walks across the road, while a family consisting of adults and children crosses the sidewalk. Cars are parked along the roadside, and a sedan drives past the camera. The environment appears overcast, suggesting cloudy weather conditions.

events_timeline.event: Multiple pedestrians, including a family group and an individual carrying a bag, walk along the sidewalk.

uncertainties: Exact positions of all pedestrians relative to the road are unclear.
Speeds of the vehicles are not measurable.

risk_assessment.why: There are no visible collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles or pedestrians.
